function solve(prices: number[], strategy: number[], k: number): number {

    const n = prices.length;

    let original_profit = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        original_profit += strategy[i] * prices[i];

    }

    const prefixOriginal = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    const prefixPrice = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        prefixOriginal[i + 1] = prefixOriginal[i] + strategy[i] * prices[i];

        prefixPrice[i + 1] = prefixPrice[i] + prices[i];

    }

    let maxDelta = -Infinity;

    const halfK = k / 2;

    for (let i = 0; i <= n - k; i++) {

        const end = i + k;

        const startSecondHalf = i + halfK;

        const originalSum = prefixOriginal[end] - prefixOriginal[i];

        const sumSecondHalf = prefixPrice[end] - prefixPrice[startSecondHalf];

        const delta = sumSecondHalf - originalSum;

        if (delta > maxDelta) {

            maxDelta = delta;

        }

    }

    return original_profit + Math.max(0, maxDelta);

}
